title: Milestone Tracker — Cloud Integration Platform
summary: Project milestone and deadline tracker for the Northwind–Clearwater Cloud Integration Platform, covering development milestones, payment deadlines, and progress metrics.
milestone_1_consequence: Development timeline shifts — each day of delay adds 1.5 days to final delivery
milestone_1_prep: Complete final stakeholder interviews and sign off requirements document
milestone_2_consequence: Sprint planning blocked — team idle time charged at standard rate
milestone_2_prep: Prepare architecture decision records and review package
milestone_3_consequence: Go-live delayed — extended environment costs of $8,000/month
milestone_3_prep: Prepare UAT test scripts and staging environment
milestone_4_consequence: Contract breach — penalty of 2% of contract value per week of delay
milestone_4_prep: Complete pre-launch checklist and runbook review
payment_1_consequence: Late fee of 1.5% per month on overdue balance
payment_2_consequence: Late fee of 1.5% per month on overdue balance
payment_3_consequence: Late fee of 1.5% per month on overdue balance
